s.z: If Lock/Keypad code is entered and system is armed, then disarm and send message of what and who dissarmed.

Reset all notification strings on any HSM state change so data
      from previous runs does not appear in new notifications
         Hubitat Safety Monitor status changes to any of
        Armed Away, Disarmed, or All Disarmed

* Build list of any unlocked doors and flag for lock attempt.
             * Uses global @Locks - update device list in WebCoRE globals.

* Build list of all open exterior door and window contacts.
             * Uses global @Door_Contacts_Exterior - update in WebCoRE globals.
             * Doors and windows share this global and report together.

* ── Step 3: Send initial armed notification ───────────────────
             * Send combined status in a single notification including
             * system status, any unlocked doors, and any open contacts.
             * Uses global @Notification_Push

p.e:
DoorLeftUnlocked "

Please Return Home and Manually Lock Door(s)"

i.v: Please Return Home and Manually Lock Door(s)

exp.str:
DoorLeftUnlocked "

Please Return Home and Manually Lock Door(s)"

s.z:
ARMED AWAY BRANCH
         * Build status strings, check locks and contacts, notify
Auto Arm System if everyone is gone, check for things left open or unlocked send status messages and error messages.

piston.z:
When system is armed check for open doors and windows.
Send SMS Message when system is armed and list any doors or windows that are open
Send SMS Message when system is disarmed
GLOBAL VARIABLES USED (manage devices in WebCoRE globals):
 *   @Door_Contacts_Exterior  → all exterior door and window contacts
 *   @Speakers_All            → all speakers for announcements
 *   @Notification_Text_Push_All → push notification device
 *   @Locks                   → all door locks including Lock 2
 *
 * LOCAL VARIABLES (manage settings in define section below):
 *   Disarmed_By_Name         → name to check for keypad unlock detection
 *   Lock_Confirm_Wait        → seconds to wait before confirming lock success
 *   Speaker_Volume           → announcement volume 0-100
 *
 * DEPENDENCIES: None - no helpers or scripts required
 * NOTE: To change devices, update the global variables in WebCoRE globals
 *       To change settings, update the define section below
